storyboard.title: Storyboard
storyboard.description: A film or video storyboard representation with multiple scenes.

id.description: The unique ID of the storyboard

userId.description: The Firebase User UID who owns this storyboard

title.description: Title of the story or concept

concept.description: Original concept or uploaded draft summary used as input

type.description: The length type of the storyboard (Curto/Longo)

style.description: Selected visual style (e.g., Default, Cartoon, Sketch)

language.description: Language of dialogue, actions, and scene details

timestamp.description: Epic milestone creation timestamp in milliseconds

videoUrl.description: Optional AI-generated background music or sound trail url

/storyboards/{storyboardId}.description: Table storing all movie, game, or video storyboards created by various users.
